title: ProjectSystem config
description: Per-project configuration that, composed with project-entity.base.schema.json, forms the effective ProjectEntity contract for one project. This is the ONLY place project-specific vocabulary lives: which kinds exist, the per-kind status enums and folders, body-section conventions, the tag registry, milestone markers, rel->kind target rules, and render metadata. The framework core is identical across projects; only this file changes.

project.description: Short identifier for the consuming project (e.g. 'project-system', 'soul-steel'). Display/label only.

projectRoot.description: Optional. Path to the directory that contains _project/, relative to this config file. Defaults to '.' (config sits at the project root). Overridable at the CLI with --root.

kinds.description: Ordered map of entity kind -> its rules. Insertion order is the display/auto-placement order. Each key is a kind name; each kind owns a folder under _project/.

tagRegistry.description: Known tag keys. Known keys have their VALUES validated; unknown keys are allowed but surfaced (info). Keys that shadow a primitive are rejected by the base schema.

relTargetKinds.description: For each rel in the base vocabulary, what its target must be: an array of kind names (target must resolve to a file of one of those kinds), or the literal 'marker' (a milestone marker), 'external' (off-graph ref; resolves only if it looks internal), or 'any'.

milestones.description: The known milestone markers (e.g. ['M1','M2']). A `milestone` link to a marker outside this set is a warning, not an error. Empty/omitted => any marker shape (e.g. M\d+) is accepted with an unknown-milestone warning.

milestonePattern.description: Regex (string) a milestone marker must match to be recognized as a marker at all. Default '^M\\d+$'.

proseStatusEnforcement.description: Whether the prose '**Status:**' header must agree with the frontmatter status, and at what severity.

render.description: Optional. Drives the hub dashboard renderer. Entirely project-agnostic: a brand string, accent tone, editorial copy, and the path to a visual-grammar kit. Kinds are auto-placed into the kit's hex slots in declared order; the kit's slot-naming is an internal adapter concern, never surfaced here.

kit.description: Absolute path to a visual-grammar kit directory (must contain build.mjs). If absent or missing, the renderer emits JSON only.

centerName.description: Label for the center tile (the contract). Default 'ProjectEntity'.

folder.description: The subfolder under _project/ that holds this kind (e.g. 'decisions'). Identity: kind is derived from this folder.

status.description: The per-kind status enum. status is the single State axis; it ranges over exactly these values for this kind.

initialStatus.description: The 'born' status a freshly scaffolded entity gets. Must be in `status`. Defaults to status[0].

filename.description: Filename scheme the scaffolder uses: 'serial' (NNNN-slug, zero-padded running number), 'date-slug' (YYYY-MM-DD-slug), or 'slug' (bare slug). Default 'slug'.

serialPad.description: For filename:'serial', how many digits to pad to. Default 4.

requiredSections.description: Body sections whose absence is a WARNING (never an error) — the empirically-universal core for this kind. Body structure is convention, not contract.

scaffoldSections.description: The fuller per-kind template the scaffolder writes at CREATE time. Supersets requiredSections so a fresh scaffold has zero missing-section warnings. Defaults to requiredSections.

render.description: Optional render metadata for this kind's hub tile: accent dot color and human labels. NO slot/position — the renderer auto-places kinds in declared order.

dot.description: Accent hex for the tile dot.

values.description: For type:'enum', the allowed values (invalid value => error).

lintAgainst.description: For type:'string', familiar values (an unfamiliar value => warning, still allowed).
